headline: Linde’s Ethics Recognition Meets Premium Valuation And ESG Investor Interest
summary: Linde has been recognized on the World's Most Ethical Companies list for the sixth consecutive year. The recognition highlights Linde's continued focus on ethics, compliance and corporate governance. The news is particularly relevant for investors applying ESG criteria to their portfolios. Linde, traded as NasdaqGS:LIN, is being acknowledged again for its approach to business integrity, which may be important context if you are weighing ESG factors alongside financial metrics. The...
